title: Spell Preparation Rules
description: Rules for preparing and changing prepared spells by class

preparation_by_class.flexibility: Limited - can only change one spell per level
High - can change entire spell list daily
High - can change entire spell list daily
Low - can only change one spell per long rest
Low - can only change one spell per long rest
Limited - can only change one spell per level
Limited - can only change one spell per level
High - can change entire spell list daily

always_prepared_spells.description: Certain features might give you a spell that you always have prepared

mechanics.list_counting: A spell that you always have prepared doesn't count against the number of spells on your prepared list
mechanics.source: Granted by class features, racial traits, or other character options

monster_preparation.default: Most spellcasting monsters don't change their lists of prepared spells
monster_preparation.dm_discretion: The DM is free to alter monster prepared spell lists
